data.body: DONE. Epic 81e2 fully executed and landed. Final board: EPIC closed(unsigned/soft-path); S1,S2,064f,46f8,5b01,1d75 closed+signed; 955c closed(force,git-ignored). origin/main=faa40e7b07 has AGENTS.md(161L)+thin CLAUDE.md(15L)+templates/AGENTS.md+examples/agent-skills+.codex/.agents shims+the docs. Post-merge main CI (semantic-conflict safety net) runs on the GitHub push; changes are docs/config w/ no runtime behavior => negligible risk. HANDOFF NOTES: (1) main-checkout CLAUDE.local.md stripped to machine-local; backup at /Users/joeoakhart/rebar/CLAUDE.local.md.bak. (2) worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-agents-md left in place for inspection (removable). (3) known enrich-prune-race flake required ~1h47m of CI rechecks (pre-existing, not from this epic).
